title: Page Builder

fields.label: Content Sections
fields.name: cms
fields.instructions: Build your page by adding and arranging content sections below. Each section is a modular layout component that you can customize independently. Drag sections to reorder them, and use the collapse/expand controls to manage your workspace efficiently. Note: When using the Page Builder, the standard WordPress content editor is hidden and the 'Show Page Title' setting in the sidebar is ignored.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow
sub_fields.name: eyebrow
sub_fields.instructions: Small label above the hero title.

sub_fields.label: Title Lines
sub_fields.name: title_lines
sub_fields.instructions: Add one row per visual title line. Inside each line, add one or more parts and highlight only the words that need the accent color.

sub_fields.label: Line Parts
sub_fields.name: line_parts
sub_fields.instructions: Add each inline text segment separately. Toggle Highlight for accent words.

sub_fields.label: Highlight
sub_fields.name: highlight
sub_fields.instructions: Use accent color for this text part.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.instructions: Short hero body copy.

sub_fields.label: Buttons
sub_fields.name: buttons
sub_fields.instructions: Primary and secondary hero buttons.

sub_fields.label: Feature Chips
sub_fields.name: features
sub_fields.instructions: Small finance category chips shown under the buttons.

sub_fields.label: Icon
sub_fields.name: icon
sub_fields.instructions: Upload an SVG icon for this chip.

sub_fields.label: Media Type
sub_fields.name: media_type
sub_fields.instructions: Choose whether the hero background uses an image or video.

sub_fields.label: Hero Image
sub_fields.name: image
sub_fields.instructions: Desktop hero background image.

sub_fields.label: Mobile Hero Image
sub_fields.name: mobile_image
sub_fields.instructions: Optional mobile-specific hero background image.

sub_fields.label: Hero Video
sub_fields.name: video
sub_fields.instructions: Background video for the hero section.

sub_fields.label: Video File
sub_fields.name: video_self_host_file
sub_fields.instructions: Upload MP4 or WebM video file.

sub_fields.label: Hero Style
sub_fields.name: hero_style
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the layout. Image Background = dark hero with the heading over a full-width photo. Text Only = light hero, heading + text on a plain background. Text + Media = light hero with an image or video beside the text.

sub_fields.label: Show Product Key Facts Bar
sub_fields.name: show_facts_bar
sub_fields.instructions: On a Finance Product page, show this product's Key Facts as a bar overlapping the bottom of the hero. Edit the facts in the "Finance Product Details" box on the product.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow
sub_fields.name: eyebrow
sub_fields.instructions: Small badge above the heading (e.g. "Up To 70% LTV").

sub_fields.label: Title Lines
sub_fields.name: title_lines
sub_fields.instructions: Add one row per visual title line. Inside each line, add one or more parts and highlight only the words that need the accent color.

sub_fields.label: Line Parts
sub_fields.name: line_parts
sub_fields.instructions: Add each inline text segment separately. Toggle Highlight for accent words.

sub_fields.label: Highlight
sub_fields.name: highlight
sub_fields.instructions: Use accent color for this text part.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.instructions: Intro copy shown below the heading.

sub_fields.label: Buttons
sub_fields.name: buttons
sub_fields.instructions: Call-to-action buttons. Use Primary for the solid button and Outline for the secondary.

sub_fields.label: Media Type
sub_fields.name: media_type
sub_fields.instructions: For the Text + Media style: show an image or a video beside the text.

sub_fields.label: Media Position
sub_fields.name: image_position
sub_fields.instructions: Which side the image or video appears on (Text + Media style only).

sub_fields.label: Image
sub_fields.name: image
sub_fields.instructions: Background photo for the Image Background style, or the side photo for the Text + Media style when Media Type is Image.

sub_fields.label: Video
sub_fields.name: video
sub_fields.instructions: Video media for this section.

sub_fields.label: Behavior
sub_fields.name: video_behavior
sub_fields.instructions: How the video plays. Autoplay = muted looping background video that pauses when off-screen. Hover = plays while the mouse is over it, resets on leave. Onclick Popup = shows a play button and opens the video in a lightbox (sound allowed).

sub_fields.label: Autoplay
sub_fields.name: video_autoplay
sub_fields.instructions: Start playing as soon as the section loads. Browsers force it to be muted. (Autoplay behavior only.)

sub_fields.label: Autoplay On Scroll
sub_fields.name: video_autoplay_on_scroll
sub_fields.instructions: Only start when the video scrolls into view (50% visible) and pause when it leaves. (Autoplay behavior only.)

sub_fields.label: Controls
sub_fields.name: video_controls
sub_fields.instructions: Show the custom play/pause and mute buttons overlaid on the video. (Autoplay behavior, not available for YouTube.)

sub_fields.label: Muted
sub_fields.name: video_muted
sub_fields.instructions: Mute the audio. Note: Autoplay and Hover are always muted by the browser regardless of this setting.

sub_fields.label: Loop
sub_fields.name: video_loop
sub_fields.instructions: Automatically restart the video from the beginning when it ends.

sub_fields.label: Popup Autoplay
sub_fields.name: video_popup_autoplay
sub_fields.instructions: Start playing automatically when the popup opens. (Onclick Popup behavior only.)

sub_fields.label: Popup Controls
sub_fields.name: video_popup_controls
sub_fields.instructions: Show the native video controls inside the popup. (Onclick Popup behavior only.)

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow
sub_fields.name: eyebrow
sub_fields.instructions: Optional small label above the heading.

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Section heading.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.instructions: Short intro copy shown below the heading.

sub_fields.label: Product Source
sub_fields.name: product_source
sub_fields.instructions: Show all published Finance Products or manually select specific products.

sub_fields.label: Selected Products
sub_fields.name: selected_products
sub_fields.instructions: Choose products and drag to set their display order.

sub_fields.label: Number of Products
sub_fields.name: posts_per_page
sub_fields.instructions: Used when Product Source is All Products. Leave empty to show all.

sub_fields.label: Grid Columns
sub_fields.name: columns
sub_fields.instructions: Uses existing card-grid column utility classes.

sub_fields.label: Order By
sub_fields.name: orderby
sub_fields.instructions: Used when Product Source is All Products.

sub_fields.instructions: Used when Product Source is All Products.

sub_fields.name: highlight
sub_fields.instructions: Use accent color for this text part.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.instructions: Optional intro copy shown below the heading.

sub_fields.label: FAQs
sub_fields.name: faqs
sub_fields.instructions: Each row is a question that expands to reveal its answer.

sub_fields.label: Question
sub_fields.name: question
sub_fields.placeholder: What is the maximum loan-to-value (LTV) available?

sub_fields.label: Answer
sub_fields.name: answer
sub_fields.instructions: Shown when the question is expanded.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow
sub_fields.name: eyebrow
sub_fields.instructions: Optional small label above the heading.

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Section heading.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.instructions: Short intro copy shown below the heading.

sub_fields.label: Case Study Source
sub_fields.name: case_study_source
sub_fields.instructions: Show all published Case Studies or manually select specific ones.

sub_fields.label: Selected Case Studies
sub_fields.name: selected_case_studies
sub_fields.instructions: Choose case studies and drag to set their display order.

sub_fields.label: Number of Case Studies
sub_fields.name: posts_per_page
sub_fields.instructions: Used when Source is All Case Studies. Leave empty to show all.

sub_fields.label: Grid Columns
sub_fields.name: columns
sub_fields.instructions: Uses existing card-grid column utility classes.

sub_fields.label: Order By
sub_fields.name: orderby
sub_fields.instructions: Used when Source is All Case Studies.

sub_fields.label: Order
sub_fields.name: order
sub_fields.instructions: Used when Source is All Case Studies.

sub_fields.label: Media Type
sub_fields.name: media_type
sub_fields.instructions: Show an image or a video. Renders as one full-width rounded media block.

sub_fields.label: Video
sub_fields.name: video
sub_fields.instructions: Video media for this section.

sub_fields.label: Behavior
sub_fields.name: video_behavior
sub_fields.instructions: How the video plays. Autoplay = muted looping background video that pauses when off-screen. Hover = plays while the mouse is over it, resets on leave. Onclick Popup = shows a play button and opens the video in a lightbox (sound allowed).

sub_fields.label: Autoplay
sub_fields.name: video_autoplay
sub_fields.instructions: Start playing as soon as the section loads. Browsers force it to be muted. (Autoplay behavior only.)

sub_fields.label: Autoplay On Scroll
sub_fields.name: video_autoplay_on_scroll
sub_fields.instructions: Only start when the video scrolls into view (50% visible) and pause when it leaves. (Autoplay behavior only.)

sub_fields.label: Controls
sub_fields.name: video_controls
sub_fields.instructions: Show the custom play/pause and mute buttons overlaid on the video. (Autoplay behavior, not available for YouTube.)

sub_fields.label: Muted
sub_fields.name: video_muted
sub_fields.instructions: Mute the audio. Note: Autoplay and Hover are always muted by the browser regardless of this setting.

sub_fields.label: Loop
sub_fields.name: video_loop
sub_fields.instructions: Automatically restart the video from the beginning when it ends.

sub_fields.label: Popup Autoplay
sub_fields.name: video_popup_autoplay
sub_fields.instructions: Start playing automatically when the popup opens. (Onclick Popup behavior only.)

sub_fields.label: Popup Controls
sub_fields.name: video_popup_controls
sub_fields.instructions: Show the native video controls inside the popup. (Onclick Popup behavior only.)

sub_fields.label: Content
sub_fields.name: content
sub_fields.instructions: Free-form rich text. Use the editor's headings, lists, links and formatting as needed.

sub_fields.label: Source
sub_fields.name: source
sub_fields.instructions: Manual = type a one-off quote into this section (recommended for a case study's own quote). Testimonial Library = reuse a testimonial authored under the Testimonials menu.

sub_fields.label: Avatar
sub_fields.name: avatar
sub_fields.instructions: Optional headshot. If empty, the author's initial is shown in a circle.

sub_fields.label: Testimonial
sub_fields.name: testimonial
sub_fields.instructions: Pick one testimonial from the library.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow
sub_fields.name: eyebrow
sub_fields.instructions: Optional small label above the heading.

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Optional section heading (the page hero usually provides the main title).

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.instructions: Optional intro copy shown below the heading.

sub_fields.label: Source
sub_fields.name: download_source
sub_fields.instructions: Show all published Downloads or manually select specific ones.

sub_fields.label: Selected Downloads
sub_fields.name: selected_downloads
sub_fields.instructions: Choose downloads and drag to set their display order.

sub_fields.label: Number of Downloads
sub_fields.name: posts_per_page
sub_fields.instructions: Used when Source is All Downloads. Leave empty to show all.

sub_fields.label: Order By
sub_fields.name: orderby
sub_fields.instructions: Used when Source is All Downloads.

sub_fields.label: Order
sub_fields.name: order
sub_fields.instructions: Used when Source is All Downloads.

sub_fields.label: Form Title
sub_fields.name: form_title
sub_fields.instructions: Heading on the enquiry card.

sub_fields.label: Form Embed
sub_fields.name: form_code
sub_fields.instructions: Paste the form shortcode (e.g. a Contact Form 7 / WPForms shortcode). Rendered via do_shortcode().

sub_fields.label: Info Title
sub_fields.name: info_title
sub_fields.instructions: Heading on the contact information card. The email / phone / office address / opening hours come from Site Settings.

sub_fields.label: Map Embed
sub_fields.name: map_embed
sub_fields.instructions: Google Maps embed iframe or a map shortcode. Shown below the contact information card. Rendered via do_shortcode(). Leave empty to hide the map.

sub_fields.label: Overlap The Hero Above
sub_fields.name: overlap_hero
sub_fields.instructions: Enable when this section sits directly below a hero — it will move up and overlap the bottom of that hero. Leave off to render as a normal full-width section.

sub_fields.label: Title Lines
sub_fields.name: title_lines
sub_fields.instructions: Add one row per visual title line. Inside each line, add one or more parts and highlight only the words that need the accent color.

sub_fields.label: Line Parts
sub_fields.name: line_parts
sub_fields.instructions: Add each inline text segment separately. Toggle Highlight for accent words.

sub_fields.label: Highlight
sub_fields.name: highlight
sub_fields.instructions: Use accent color for this text part.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.instructions: Optional intro copy shown below the heading.

sub_fields.label: Columns
sub_fields.name: columns
sub_fields.instructions: Number of cards per row on desktop. Collapses responsively on smaller screens.

sub_fields.label: Cards
sub_fields.name: cards
sub_fields.instructions: Each card shows an initial circle, a title, a short description and a link.

sub_fields.label: Initial
sub_fields.name: initial
sub_fields.instructions: Single letter shown in the circle. Defaults to the first letter of the title.

sub_fields.label: Link
sub_fields.name: link
sub_fields.instructions: The card's call-to-action (e.g. "Contact Team").

description: Flexible content page builder for creating custom page layouts. Build pages using modular, reusable content sections that can be arranged in any order to create unique page designs.
